name_cn:
Top Quality
🌟Hobo 3-in-1 (Full Leather)
Featuring a detachable P House Re-Edition 2005 Saffiano leather nameplate with a keychain, detachable adjustable logo fabric strap, detachable zippered leather pouch, and detachable metal chain strap. Multiple carrying styles, top zipper closure. Nylon lining. Enamel triangle metal logo!
Size: L22xH18xW6.5CM
Model: 1BH204
